summary: Lying down causes an immediate increase in venous return as deoxygenated blood pools in lower body veins; this enhances cardiac filling but does not significantly alter resting metabolic demands or cerebral perfusion rates substantially beyond baseline levels for most individuals. \boxed{\text{Immediate increase in venous return}}

Answer choice: A
